element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic traversal on stable platforms
Jumping over fixed barrels on predictable paths
Rolling barrels follow simple patterns; player learns avoidance through repetition
Converts hazards into scoring opportunities; temporary invulnerability mechanic
Vertical movement introduces new traversal axis
Moving platforms require timing adjustment; introduces momentum concept
Faster, less predictable enemies; requires precision avoidance
Interactive level elements that collapse platforms when destroyed

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe platform zones between barrel spawns
Nail/rivet destruction eliminating enemy spawn points
typical_tension_triggers: Barrel spawns from DK at top
Multiple hazards converging on single platform
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical wave pattern: 25m introduces rhythm gently; difficulty escalates through 75m with conveyor timing; 100m combines all elements into sustained pressure. Stages repeat with increasing speed on loop.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hammer power-ups placed in branching paths; optional risky routes reward higher scores

difficulty_curve.early_game: 25m (Girder stage): Tutorial-like introduction. Simple barrel patterns, predictable trajectory, multiple safe platforms. Establishes core jump-and-dodge loop.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: 50m absent from NES port (memory limitation). 75m (Elevator): Introduces moving platform timing. Conveyor belts require different momentum management. Barrel patterns increase in complexity.
difficulty_curve.late_game: 100m (Rivets stage): Integrates all mechanics. Fireballs replace slow barrels. Rivets add environmental destruction mechanic. Sustained multi-hazard scenarios. Speed increases on successive loops.
notable_spikes: Transition from 25m to 75m: Conveyor belt timing adds layer of complexity
Introduction of fireballs in 100m: Unpredictable movement breaks pattern reliance
Loop transitions: Each stage repeats with accelerated barrel/enemy speeds
Revision 0 oversight: Demo mode hammer-jumping extends tool use unpredictably

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal platforms with predictable barrel spawning from top-center. Multiple safe zones between hazards. Hammer power-ups create score maximization opportunities. Establishes rhythm and reward structure.
Vertical conveyor belt movement forces player to adjust jump timing and platform tracking. Barrels interact with moving surfaces creating dynamic collision patterns. Tests rhythm adjustment.
Platforms narrowing as rivets are destroyed. Fireballs patrol reduced space. Destruction becomes both goal and hazard amplifier. Final stage combines all prior mechanics under pressure.
After 100m completion, cycle repeats with increased speed. Barrel velocities increase. Enemy patterns accelerate. Creates sustained difficulty escalation without new mechanics—pure execution test.
